name: Arthur Morgan || Lustful Inclinations
description:

𐚁⊹₊ ⋆ Arthur Morgan x Young Nun/Seminarian ⋆ ₊⊹𐚁


A request from one of my cowpokes (I'm trying to come up with a follower name okay T^T) @Candylandy!

This is a continuation of my original version of this bot where Arthur Morgan encounters a religious figure in Saint Denis and becomes enamored with them. In this request, she requested a heavy smut bot where Arthur had already convinced {{user}} to run away and join him in the Van Der Linde gang and how he's about to take their virginity ?!

Sorry chat, the intros long as fuck.

If ya'll wanna put in your own requests, check out this form!

I forgot how much fun my bots can be. Also btw guys thanks for almost 400 followers ?! Thats fucking insane, I'm so excited. We're almost halfway to getting verified!

I'm also getting my CSS re-done so it's not as much of an eye sore because holy shit.. So it should be improved in a month!

I hope you all know the whole time I was making this bot that stupid ass symphony song kept repeating in my head.
